'''Force Flight''' was an online game found on [[StarWars.com]]. In the game, the player has to navigate Star Wars vehicle through four levels of increasing difficulty. The levels included the [[bongo]] journey through [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] core, the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wing]] [[Trench Run Defense|trench run]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]] asteroid escape, and the [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] chase. The game has since been removed from the site.

{{Game-stub}}
